title: PuzzleManifest
description: Bundle-shipped daily puzzle (rewrite-in-place, no migration). Mirrors tools/models.py PuzzleManifest and frontend/src/contracts/manifest.ts. The served bank is story-first (derived from generate_story for all four tiers) emitted with exclude_none. Accepts BOTH a pre-pivot v1 manifest (story fields absent) and a story-first manifest (optional scenarioId/story/subjectNoun/variant + category kind/unit/anchor/glyphPack + value magnitude/phrase/refPhrase). Every optional is OMITTED when unset - a present-null is rejected. schemaVersion stays 1 in this row.

evolution.change: Initial PuzzleManifest v1: schemaVersion, puzzleId (UTC date = the seed), tier, shapeId, templateRev, entities[], categories{n,list[AttributeCategory]}, constraints[Constraint], solution, hintTrace[HintStep]. Operands never name an entity directly, so clues stay shape-agnostic.
evolution.why: Bundle-shipped puzzle contract typed before logic (CLAUDE.md sec 11); the solver is glyph-agnostic so which packs/values are picked never changes uniqueness.

evolution.change: Additive story-first fields (schemaVersion unchanged at 1): manifest scenarioId/story/subjectNoun/variant; AttributeCategory kind/unit/anchor/glyphPack; AttributeValue magnitude/phrase/refPhrase. Each optional field may be OMITTED (clean datasets emit, exclude_none) or present-as-null (served daily emit) - both accepted.
evolution.why: Story-first pivot narrates puzzles; every new field is OPTIONAL (str|None in the model) so a pre-pivot v1 manifest, a null-valued daily manifest, and an omitted-field datasets manifest all validate - no persisted-contract break.

evolution.change: Tightened the story-first optionals to reject present-null: manifest scenarioId/story/subjectNoun/variant, AttributeCategory kind/unit/anchor/glyphPack, and AttributeValue magnitude/phrase/refPhrase are now typed T (not [T, null]). They stay OPTIONAL (absent when unset). The served bank is now derived from the story-first matrix generator (generate_story) for all four tiers and emitted with exclude_none, so no served/datasets manifest carries a null field.
evolution.why: The daily/served emit now drops unset optionals (exclude_none), matching the datasets masters, so a null-valued optional can no longer be produced - a null therefore signals a real emit bug and the schema forbids it. schemaVersion stays 1 (the story-first fields remain additive and optional-absent).
